description: Harness runtime + AI agent orchestration for the DEVOOPS multi-repo platform.

features.name: agent_registry
features.title: Agent Registry model and API
features.description: Create the Agent, Tool, and ExecutionContext models in devoops-agents with CRUD API. Agents have name, description, tools list, and status. Tools have name, description, and schema. ExecutionContext captures agent runs with input/output/status.
acceptance: Existe schema/model para Agent, Tool, ExecutionContext
API endpoints: CRUD agents, list/create executions
Tests cubren creacion de agente con tools asociadas
init.sh verde al finalizar

features.name: harness_leader_protocol
features.title: Leader orchestration protocol
features.description: Implement the leader/implementer/reviewer orchestration protocol as a lightweight runtime. The leader receives a task, decomposes it, dispatches to implementer sub-agents, and invokes reviewer before closing.
acceptance: Existe un modulo de orquestacion que emula el flujo leader/implementer/reviewer
El flujo completo se puede ejecutar via CLI o API
Estado persiste en disco (progress/)
Tests cubren ciclo completo: plan -> implement -> review -> close

features.name: core_automation_integration
features.title: Connect automation-engine triggers to devoops-core hooks
features.description: Wire the existing AutomationHook model in devoops-core to the automation-engine webhook receiver. When a deployment event happens in core, it triggers a workflow in automation-engine.
acceptance: devoops-core dispatches webhook to automation-engine on deployment events
automation-engine receives webhook and creates an execution
Execution log is created and status is trackable
Tests: event -> webhook -> execution flow with mock server

features.name: env_management
features.title: Environment management in devoops-core
features.description: Create Environment model (name, project_id, organization_id, variables) with CRUD API and RBAC scoping. Each environment belongs to an organization and project.
acceptance: Existe modelo Environment con migracion
API CRUD para environments scoped a organizacion
RBAC: solo owner/admin/developer pueden crear/editar entornos
Variables de entorno almacenadas cifradas
Tests PestPHP cubren CRUD y RBAC

features.name: cli_env_commands
features.title: Environment commands in devoops-cli
features.description: Add `devoops env create`, `env list`, `env delete`, `env var set`, `env var get` commands to the CLI, hitting the core API.
acceptance: `devoops env create <name> --org <org>` funciona
`devoops env list` lista entornos de la organizacion activa
`devoops env var set <key>=<value>` actualiza variable
`devoops env var get <key>` muestra valor
Tests Go cubren comandos (con mock server)

features.name: api_key_management
features.title: API key management in devoops-core
features.description: Create ApiKey model with hashed tokens, scoped to organizations, with expiration and last_used tracking. API endpoints for CRUD.
acceptance: Existe modelo ApiKey con migracion (token hasheado, expiracion, scoping)
API CRUD solo para owner/admin
Autenticacion via Bearer token usando ApiKey
Tests PestPHP cubren creacion, rotacion y revocacion

features.name: email_service_resend
features.title: Email service integration with Resend
features.description: Integrate Resend for transactional email across DEVOOPS. Create EmailService model, provider abstraction, API endpoints, and Cloudflare DNS/Routing auto-provisioning. Based on Plan/archive/plan_emailing_resend_multidominio.md.
acceptance: Existe modelo EmailService con migracion en devoops-core
API CRUD: crear/verificar/eliminar servicio de email por proyecto
Integracion con Resend API: crear dominio, generar API key scoped
Integracion opcional con Cloudflare API para DNS automatico
Test email end-to-end
Tests PestPHP cubren CRUD y verificacion

features.name: fork_hygiene
features.title: Fork maintenance infrastructure for devoops-core
features.description: Implement the Phase 0 fork hygiene checklist from the original fork plan: rebase cadence, changelog, feature flags, CI, own Docker image, CONTRIBUTING.md. Ensures devoops-core remains maintainable relative to upstream Coolify.
acceptance: WEBSHOOKS_CHANGES.md (o DEVOOPS_CHANGES.md) en raiz de devoops-core con cada cambio del fork
Feature flags via config('devoops.feature.x') en cada cambio del fork
Migraciones DB en namespace devoops_*
CI pipeline: tests upstream + tests propios
Docker image propia ghcr.io/fmonfasani/devoops-core:vX.Y.Z
CONTRIBUTING.md con regla 'upstream-first si el cambio es generico'
